## Summary

Describe the improvement in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed solution.

## Why It Fits This Repository

Explain why this belongs in `codex-workflow-kit` and does not add unnecessary complexity.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or existing alternatives.

## Notes

Anything else that would help review the request.
